    97→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
    98→        Dim strReturn As String = ""
    99→        Try
   100→            Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   101→
   102→            hexv = ""
   103→            Do While DecNum > 0
   104→                na = DecNum Mod 16
   105→                Select Case na
   106→                    Case 10
   107→                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   108→                    Case 11
   109→                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   110→                    Case 12
   111→                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   112→                    Case 13
   113→                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   114→                    Case 14
   115→                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   116→                    Case 15
   117→                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   118→                    Case Else
   119→                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   120→                End Select
   121→                If DecNum >= 16 Then
   122→                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   123→                Else
   124→                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   125→                    Exit Do
   126→                End If
   127→            Loop
   128→
   129→            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   130→                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
   131→            Else
   132→                strReturn = hexv
   133→            End If
   134→        Catch ex As Exception
   135→            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)
   136→        End Try
   137→        Dec2Hex = strReturn
   138→
   139→    End Function

   519→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
   520→
   521→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
   522→        Dim i As Integer
   523→
   524→        retVal = ""
   525→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   526→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
   527→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
   528→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
   529→                i = i + 1
   530→            Else
   531→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
   532→                i = i + 3
   533→            End If
   534→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
   535→        Next
   536→        Return retVal
   537→

   537→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
   538→
   539→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
   540→        Dim i As Integer
   541→
   542→        retVal = ""
   543→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   544→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
   545→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
   546→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
   547→                i = i + 1
   548→            Else
   549→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
   550→                i = i + 3
   551→            End If
   552→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)

    60→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
    61→        Dim strReturn As String = ""
    62→        Try
    63→            Dim hexv As String, na As Long
    64→
    65→            hexv = ""
    66→            Do While DecNum > 0
    67→                na = DecNum Mod 16
    68→                Select Case na
    69→                    Case 10
    70→                        hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
    71→                    Case 11
    72→                        hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
    73→                    Case 12
    74→                        hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
    75→                    Case 13
    76→                        hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
    77→                    Case 14
    78→                        hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
    79→                    Case 15
    80→                        hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
    81→                    Case Else
    82→                        hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
    83→                End Select
    84→                If DecNum >= 16 Then
    85→                    DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
    86→                Else
    87→                    hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
    88→                    Exit Do
    89→                End If
    90→            Loop
    91→
    92→            If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
    93→                strReturn = Mid(hexv, 2)
    94→            Else
    95→                strReturn = hexv
    96→            End If
    97→        Catch ex As Exception
    98→            'RemoteLog(MethodBase.GetCurrentMethod().Name & ", ErrorNumber: " & Err.Number & ", Desc: " & Err.Description)

# NX4C REAR Project Analysis

**Solution:** `NX4CREAR.sln`
**Platform:** VB.NET .NET Framework 4.0, WinForms
**Location:** `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C REAR\`
**Analysis Date:** 2026-03-13

---

## 1. Solution Projects

| Project Name | Folder | vbproj | Station No. | Role |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| RH_JA01(201) | `RH_JA01\` | `RH_JA01(201).vbproj` | 201 | RH side JA01 — torque tool x1, barcode scan, label print |
| RH_JA02(202) | `RH_JA02\` | `RH_JA02(202).vbproj` | 202 | RH side JA02 — torque tool x2 |
| RH_JA03(203) | `RH_JA03\` | `RH_JA03(203).vbproj` | 203 | RH side JA03 — torque tool x2 + laser measurement |
| LH_JA01(211) | `LH_JA01\` | `LH_JA01(211).vbproj` | 211 | LH side JA01 — same structure as RH_JA01 |
| LH_JA02(212) | `LH_JA02\` | `LH_JA02(212).vbproj` | 212 | LH side JA02 — same structure as RH_JA02 |
| END(210) | `END TEST\` | `END(210).vbproj` | 210 | End-of-line test — load cell x4 (L/R x STG1/STG2), final barcode print |
| SERVEr Search | `SERVER SEARCH\` | `SERVEr Search.vbproj` | — | SQL Server data search tool (standalone viewer) |
| FtechNiSetup | `FtechNiSetup\` | `FtechNiSetup.vdproj` | — | Installer project |
| Ftech_Setup | `Ftech_Setup\` | `Ftech_Setup.vdproj` | — | Installer project |

> **Note:** `JA02/`, `JA03/`, `JA04/` folders exist under the REAR root but reference separate `.vbproj` files (`FRT JA02.vbproj`, `FRT JA03.vbproj`, `FRT JA04.vbproj`) not included in `NX4CREAR.sln` — these are FRONT station projects stored in the same directory for convenience.

---

## 2. File Structure (per project)

All JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 projects follow an identical structure:

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `FrmMain.vb` | Main form — state machine, serial I/O, DO control, DB save |
| `Module1.vb` | Global variables — port names, spec limits, Load/Save MDB/SQL |
| `Common/MDBOperation.vb` | DB connection helpers — MDB (local) and SQL Server (remote) |
| `FrmPort.vb` | Serial port configuration UI |
| `FrmPart.vb` | Part number master management UI |
| `FrmSearch.vb` | Local result search UI |
| `FrmWorkStandardSet.vb` | Work standard image file management (FlexCell grid) |
| `FrmImage.vb` | Work instruction image display |
| `FrmBarcode.vb` | Barcode label print position settings (RH_JA01 only) |
| `FrmBasic.vb` | Spec (min/max) setting form (END TEST only) |
| `FormPassword.vb` | Password input dialog |
| `AssemblyInfo.vb` | Assembly metadata |

**END TEST** additional files:

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `FrmBarcode.vb` | End barcode format settings (6 field positions) |
| `FrmBasic.vb` | Load cell spec settings (Load1/Load2 L/R min/max/tol) |

**SERVER SEARCH** (standalone):

| File | Role |
|---|---|
| `FrmMain.vb` | SQL Server query UI — date range + serial filter, FlexCell grid display, Excel export |
| `Module1.vb` | (none — all inline) |

---

## 3. Communication Protocols

### 3-1. Serial Module (I/O Module — all JA stations)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (stored in DB as `MODULE`) |
| Baudrate | 115200 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Direction | Bidirectional |
| TX format | `S` + 8-char DO bit string + `E` (10 bytes total, e.g. `S00000000E`) |
| RX format | `S` + 32-char DI bit string + `E` (34 bytes total) |
| Parse rule | Frame starts with `"S"`, ends with `"E"`, length == 34; bits 0–15 mapped to `D_Value(0..15)` |
| Poll method | Dedicated background thread (`ThreadTask2`) — blocking `ReadLine()` loop |

### 3-2. Serial Scanner (Barcode Reader)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (`SCANNER`) |
| Baudrate | 9600 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Event | `DataReceived` event handler |
| Parse rule | `ReadLine()`, strip trailing char (`Mid$(data,1,Len-1)`) |
| Trigger | `wStep = 1` — valid scan length 14 chars (JA01) or 26 chars (JA02) |
| JA01 behavior | 14-char scan = PartNo → `LoadPArt()` |
| JA02 behavior | 26-char scan = full LineSerial; right 14 chars = PartNo |

### 3-3. Serial Torque Tool (Atlas Copco / similar)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (`TOOL1`, `TOOL2` for JA02/JA03) |
| Baudrate | 9600 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Protocol | Binary frame, 132 bytes per result |
| Parse rule | Read byte-by-byte (`ReadByte`), accumulate 132 bytes; extract bytes 27–28 as hex, convert to decimal; divide by 1000 (TOOL1) or 100 (TOOL2) for Nm value |
| Status byte | `sRecvData(5) = "01"` indicates valid tightening result |
| Active step | Only processed when `wStep = 4` |
| Poll method | Dedicated background thread (`ThreadTask1`, `ThreadTask3`) — `DoEvents()` loop |

### 3-4. Serial Printer (Zebra ZPL label printer)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Port | Configurable (`PRINTER`) |
| Baudrate | 9600 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Protocol | ZPL (Zebra Programming Language) text commands |
| Command structure | `^XA` ... `^XZ` frame; `^BXN` = DataMatrix barcode; `^A0N` = font/text fields |
| Fields printed | PartNo, SerialNumber, PartName |

### 3-5. Serial Load Cell (END TEST station only)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Ports | `Load1L`, `Load1R`, `Load2L`, `Load2R` (4 separate ports) |
| Baudrate | 14400 |
| DataBits | 8 |
| Event | `DataReceived` per port |
| Parse rule | `ReadLine()`, strip trailing char; extract chars 10–17 (8 chars) as numeric weight value (format: `ST,GS,    0.00 kg`) |
| Reset command | Sent `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A` to tare/zero load cell |
| Active step | Only logged to array when `wStep = 5` (STG1) or `wStep = 9` (STG2) |

### 3-6. SQL Server (Remote DB)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Host | `192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR` |
| Database | `NX4C` |
| User ID | `sa` |
| Password | `sns123.,` (hardcoded) |
| Provider | `SQLOLEDB` via `ADODB.Connection` |
| Usage | Read `TablePart` (part master), INSERT/UPDATE `TableMainRH` / `TableMainLH` |

### 3-7. Access MDB (Local Config DB)

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Path | `.\DB\DB.mdb` (each project's own) |
| Common DB | `..\..\Common\CommonDB.mdb` (shared across stations) |
| Provider | `Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0` via `ADODB.Connection` |
| Usage | Load/Save port config, spec limits, barcode positions, image file list |

---

## 4. I/O (Digital) Address Map

### 4-1. DI — Input signals (D_Value index)

| Index | Signal | Description |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | DI_00 | Start trigger — part load detected |
| 1 | DI_01 | Reset trigger — part removed / emergency reset |
| 2 | DI_02 | OK confirmation — conveyor advance signal |
| 3 | DI_03 | STG1 start trigger (END TEST) / re-load previous part (JA01) |
| 4 | DI_04 | STG2 start trigger (END TEST) |

### 4-2. DO — Output signals (D_OutString bit index)

| Index | Signal | Description |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | DO_00 | Position indicator LH |
| 1 | DO_01 | Position indicator RH |
| 2 | DO_02 | (reserved) |
| 3 | DO_03 | Remote option output |
| 4 | DO_04 | Part loaded / ready signal |
| 5 | DO_05 | Tightening OK signal |
| 6 | DO_06 | Final OK / complete signal |
| 7 | DO_07 | (reserved) |

**Protocol:** String format `S{b0}{b1}...{b7}00000000E` — bits are ASCII '0' or '1', fixed 10 chars, written via `Serial_Module.Write(D_OutString)`

---

## 5. State Machine (wStep)

### 5-1. JA01 / JA02 / JA03 / LH_JA01 / LH_JA02 (Torque tightening stations)

| Step | Name | Action | Transition Condition |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | IDLE | Wait for part | `D_Value(0) = 1` → step 1 |
| 1 | SCAN_WAIT | Prompt barcode scan | Scanner `DataReceived` event → loads part data → step 2 |
| 2 | SCAN_DONE | Part identified | Auto → step 3 |
| 3 | SERIAL_GEN | Generate LineSerial number | Auto → step 4 |
| 4 | TIGHTEN_WAIT | Wait for torque result | `ThreadTask1/3` receives 132-byte frame → evaluates OK/NG → stays at 4 until both tools OK |
| 4.1 | TIGHTEN_COMPLETE | Both torque OK | Print barcode + SaveDB → step 5 |
| 5 | CONFIRM_WAIT | Wait for output confirm | `D_Value(2) = 1` → step 6 |
| 6 | DONE | Show complete | Init + show image → step 7 |
| 7 | RESET_DO | Clear all DOs | All DO OFF → step 0 |
| rStep=1 | RESET_TRIG | Reset trigger detected | `D_Value(1)=1 AND wStep≠0` → clear DOs → rStep=2 |
| rStep=2 | RESET_DONE | InitControl | → wStep=0, rStep=0 |

### 5-2. END TEST (210) — Load cell end-of-line test

| Step | Name | Action | Transition Condition |
|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | IDLE | Wait for ready | `D_Value(0) = 1` → step 1 |
| 1 | SERIAL_WAIT | Wait both LH+RH serial scanned | Both `srcLbSerialL` and `srcLbSerialR` non-empty → step 2 |
| 2 | RESET_LOADCELL | Send tare command to all 4 load cells | Auto → step 2.1 |
| 2.1 | WAIT_RESET | Brief wait after reset | Auto → step 3 |
| 3 | STG_SELECT | Detect which stage to start | `D_Value(3)=1` → step 4 (STG1) / `D_Value(4)=1` → step 8 (STG2) |
| 4 | STG1_INIT | Initialize timers, arrays for STG1 | Auto → step 5 |
| 5 | STG1_MEASURE | Sample Load1L/R into arrays, plot graph | `D_Value(3) = 0` → step 6 |
| 6 | STG1_CALC | Calculate max/avg, judge OK/NG, DO_ON(4) | Auto → step 11 |
| 7 | STG2_TRIGGER | Wait for STG2 start | `D_Value(4)=1` → step 8 |
| 8 | STG2_INIT | Initialize timers, arrays for STG2 | Auto → step 9 |
| 9 | STG2_MEASURE | Sample Load2L/R into arrays, plot graph | `D_Value(4) = 0` → step 10 |
| 10 | STG2_CALC | Calculate max/avg, judge OK/NG, DO_ON(5) | Auto → step 11 |
| 11 | DB_PRINT | UpdateDB + BarcodePrint if OK | Auto → step 11.1 |
| 11.1 | BARCODE_VERIFY | Wait for final barcode scan verification | `srcBarCheckLH="OK" AND srcBarCheckRH="OK"` → DO_ON(6) → step 12 |
| 12 | COMPLETE_WAIT | Wait for unload signal | `D_Value(2) = 1` → clear all DOs → step 100 |
| 100 | FINISH | Clear, show result | Auto → step 0 |
| rStep=1 | EMERGENCY_RESET | `D_Value(1)=1` at any step | Clear all DOs, InitControl → wStep=100 |

---

## 6. Data Flow

```
[Barcode Scanner Serial]
  --> ReadLine() in DataReceived
  --> ScanData = Mid(Incoming, 1, Len-1)
  --> Validate length (14 or 26 chars)
  --> LoadPArt(partNo) → SQL Server TablePart
  --> Set OptionPosition (LH/RH), OptionRemote
  --> DO_ON/OFF(0,1,3) for position/remote indicators

[Torque Tool Serial (binary)]
  --> ReadByte() in background thread
  --> Accumulate 132 bytes
  --> bytes[27:28] hex → Dec2Hex/Hex2Dec → / 1000 (or /100) = Nm value
  --> bytes[5] = "01" = valid tightening complete
  --> Compare vs Basic_TQ_MIN ~ Basic_TQ_MAX
  --> Display OK (Blue) / NG (Red), play sound

[Module I/O Serial]
  --> ReadLine() in background thread
  --> Frame: "S" + 32 bits + "E" (34 chars)
  --> Parse bits 0..15 → D_Value array
  --> Timer1 (100ms) → update IN_LABEL colors
  --> wStep state machine in Tmr_Work1 (100ms) reads D_Value

[Load Cell Serial x4 (END TEST)]
  --> ReadLine() in DataReceived
  --> Strip trailing char
  --> Mid(data, 10, 8) = weight value string → CDbl()
  --> Stored in ValueLoad1L/R, ValueLoad2L/R
  --> wStep 5/9: append to array + graph (HiResTimer timestamp)
  --> wStep 6/10: calculate AVR/MAX, compare spec, judge OK/NG

[SQL Server INSERT/UPDATE]
  --> JA01: INSERT INTO TABLEMAINRH (JA01_DATE, JA01_START_TIME, JA01_END_TIME, LINESERIAL, PARTNO, JA01_TQ1, JA01_TQ2, JA01_DECISION)
  --> JA02: UPDATE TableMainRH SET JA02_DATE, JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2, JA02_DECISION WHERE LineSerial
  --> END(JA04): UPDATE TableMainLH/RH SET JA04_STG1_Max, JA04_STG1_AVR, JA04_STG1_DECISION, JA04_STG2_Max, JA04_STG2_AVR, JA04_STG2_DECISION

[ZPL Printer Serial]
  --> Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
  --> ^BXN DataMatrix barcode field (SerialNumber)
  --> ^A0N text fields (PartNo, SerialNumber, PartName)
  --> Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")
```

---

## 7. DB Tables

### 7-1. Local MDB (DB.mdb — per project)

| Table | Columns | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `Table_SerialPort` | MODULE, SCANNER, PRINTER, TOOL1, TOOL2, LASER1, LASER2, PASSWORD | Serial port assignments and password |
| `Table_BASIC` | TOOL1_MIN, TOOL1_MAX, TOOL1_UNIT, TOOL2_MIN, TOOL2_MAX, TOOL2_UNIT | Torque spec limits (JA01~JA03) |
| `Table_BASIC` (END) | Unit, Load1MinL, Load1MaxL, Load1TolL, Load2MinL, Load2MaxL, Load2TolL, Load1MinR, Load1MaxR, Load1TolR, Load2MinR, Load2MaxR, Load2TolR, IgnoreStart, IgnoreEnd, MeasureTypeL, MeasureTypeR | Load cell spec limits and measurement type |
| `Table_Image` | ID, StandardFile | Work instruction image file paths |
| `Table_Barcode` | B1X, B1Y, B1L, B2X..B6W, B6H | Barcode label print position settings |
| `Table_Etc` | LINE_POSITION (unused) | Miscellaneous settings |

### 7-2. SQL Server (NX4C database)

| Table | Key Columns | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `TablePart` | PartNo, PartName, OptionPosition, OptionRemote | Part master — LH/RH designation, Remote option |
| `TableMainRH` | JA01_DATE, JA01_START_TIME, JA01_END_TIME, LINESERIAL, PARTNO, JA01_TQ1, JA01_TQ2, JA01_DECISION, JA02_DATE, JA02_TQ1, JA02_TQ2, JA02_DECISION, JA03_*, JA04_STG1_Max, JA04_STG1_AVR, JA04_STG1_DECISION, JA04_STG2_* | RH side process results — one row per unit, updated station by station |
| `TableMainLH` | Same column pattern as TableMainRH | LH side process results |

---

## 8. FlexCell References

| Project | Reference | Version | Usage |
|---|---|---|---|
| All JA stations | `FlexCell.dll` | 4.3.7.0 | `FlexCell.Grid` in FrmMain (I/O monitor grid), FrmWorkStandardSet (image list grid) |
| SERVER SEARCH | `FlexCell.dll` (via `Grid1`) | 4.3.7.0 | Main data search result grid (`SetDataBinding`, `ExportToExcel`) |
| DLL Path | `C:\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll` | — | Installed component |

**FlexCell usage patterns:**

- `Init_Grid(GridName As FlexCell.Grid)` — initialize with 4 columns (No., I/O, Dec.) for I/O monitor display
- `SetDataBinding(dataset, tableName)` — SERVER SEARCH result binding
- `Grid1.ExportToExcel(path, True)` — export to .xls
- `FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter`, `ResizeEnum.Columns`, `SelectionModeEnum.ByCell`

---

## 9. Additional COM References

| Component | Usage | Project |
|---|---|---|
| `ACTETHERLib` / `AxACTETHERLib` | Ethernet I/O controller (ACTOOL Ether) — IN_LABEL/OUT_LABEL typed as `AxCWUIControlsLib.AxCWButton` | END TEST (210) |
| `AxCWUIControlsLib` | CW UI button controls for I/O display | END TEST (210) |

> **Note:** JA01~JA03, LH_JA01~LH_JA02 use standard `Label` controls for I/O display. END TEST uses `AxCWButton` controls from the ACTOOL Ether COM component, indicating a different hardware I/O module for that station.

---

## 10. Hardcoded Constants

| Name / Location | Value | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| SQL Server connection string (all `MDBOperation.vb`) | `Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=192.168.0.200\NX4C_SVR;Initial Catalog=NX4C;User ID=sa;Password=sns123.,` | Central SQL Server access |

### 통신 프로토콜

- **I/O 모듈** (115200bps): `S` + 32-bit DI string + `E` (34바이트), DO는 `S00000000E` 형식
- **토크 공구** (9600bps): 132바이트 바이너리 프레임, bytes[27:28] hex → /1000 = Nm
- **바코드 스캐너** (9600bps): ReadLine, 14자(JA01) 또는 26자(JA02+)
- **ZPL 프린터** (9600bps): `^XA`...`^XZ` DataMatrix 라벨
- **로드셀 4채널** (14400bps): `Mid(data,10,8)` 파싱, 리셋 명령 `0x01 0x5A 0x0D 0x0A`
